ingress: people.people_master (linkedin_url IS NOT NULL) — seed source for vendor tier
middle: linkedin_monitor.py — bridge reads vendor tier (field_monitor.check_log), maps changes to person_unique_id, fires EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE into existing movement engine
movement_engine.py — existing state machine processes the event (NO MODIFICATIONS)
egress: people.person_movement_history — movement record written by existing movement engine
field_monitor.check_log — append-only audit trail (written by Cloudflare Workers, NOT by bridge)

summary: Integrate Field Monitor vendor tier into Talent Flow for LinkedIn public profile change detection. field_monitor.* tables are the vendor staging layer (same architectural tier as vendor.people, vendor.blog, vendor.ct). Cloudflare Workers write to vendor tier. Bridge module in hub Middle layer reads FROM vendor tier and fires EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE into the existing movement engine. Seeds 100 LinkedIn URLs from people.people_master into field_monitor.url_registry. Sample-gated to 100 records.

payload.transformation_statement: This transforms LinkedIn profile field values stored in field_monitor.field_state (constants from vendor tier) into talent movement signals via EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE routed through the existing movement engine (variables in sub-hub canonical tables).
payload.vendor_tier_note: field_monitor.* IS the vendor layer for this tool — same architectural tier as vendor.people, vendor.blog, vendor.ct. Cloudflare Workers own the write side. Hub Middle layer owns the read/bridge side.

ctb_compliance.vendor_staging: field_monitor.* — Cloudflare Workers write here. Bridge module READS only.

constants: field_monitor 7-gate funnel pipeline (Cloudflare Workers, no changes)
variables: field_monitor.url_registry rows (seeded LinkedIn URLs — vendor tier)
field_monitor.check_log rows (change detection audit trail — vendor tier, written by Workers)
DetectedEvent instances routed to MovementEngine.detect_event() (bridge output)
people.person_movement_history rows (if movement confirmed — canonical output)

parser_kv_entries.www.linkedin.com::current_title: Extract current job title from public LinkedIn HTML (JSON-LD > meta > HTML fallback)
parser_kv_entries.www.linkedin.com::current_company: Extract current company from public LinkedIn HTML (JSON-LD > meta > HTML fallback)

kill_switches.KILL_TALENT_FLOW_MONITOR: Disables LinkedIn change bridging into movement engine
kill_switches.KILL_LINKEDIN_SEED: Disables new URL registration only (existing monitors continue)

db_targets: field_monitor.url_registry (INSERT — seed LinkedIn URLs into vendor tier)
field_monitor.field_state (INSERT — seed field tracking entries in vendor tier)
field_monitor.check_log (READ ONLY — bridge reads detected changes from vendor tier)
doc_targets: hubs/people-intelligence/pipeline.md (add Talent Flow Monitor section showing vendor-tier flow)
hubs/people-intelligence/SCHEMA.md (add field_monitor cross-reference as vendor tier)
